race.comment: SUPERMASSIVE (1) came out quickly from the wide gate and showed a stack of tenacity in the heavy (8) going to go under narrowly with the 59.5kg when second over 1300m at Warwick Farm. Has a similar set-up for this and can get the trip fourth-up. REAL BAKER (11) demolished a handy field first-up at Bathurst, then faded late in the heavy going when seventh over 1250m at Canterbury. Drops 4kg in weight today and will appreciate a firmer surface. Expected to go close. BARBRAY (8) capable on his day and was not that far from the winner when fifth over 1250m at Canterbury. Tommy Berry hops aboard and he should get a better tempo for this. Solid top-three player. RIMBAUD (5) has his hoof on the till fourth-up and looking for this trip and further now. Kept finding in the heavy going with a gritty third over 1300m at Warwick Farm in this class. Stays in the mix.
